prompt_text: Open source or affordable HR tools instead of BambooHR
response:
# Affordable HR Alternatives to BambooHR

## Open Source Options

### **Odoo HR**
- Free, comprehensive module within Odoo suite
- Employee database, leave management, payroll, recruitment
- Requires self-hosting; steeper learning curve
- Good for organizations with technical support

### **OrangeHRM**
- Open source & commercial versions
- Leave, attendance, recruitment, performance management
- Self-hosted option available
- Active community

### **ERPNext**
- Free and open source
- HR, payroll, recruitment, employee lifecycle
- Includes accounting integration
- Requires hosting setup

---

## Budget-Friendly Paid Tools

| Tool | Starting Price | Best For |
|------|---|---|
| **Zoho People** | ~$1/employee/month | Growing companies; integrates with Zoho ecosystem |
| **BrightHire** | Free-$5/user/month | Small teams; simple tracking |
| **Lattice** | ~$11/user/month | Performance management focus |
| **Guidepoint** | ~$6/user/month | Small business needs |
| **Deel** | Free-$10/employee/month | Remote/global teams |

---

## Lightweight Alternatives

- **Airtable** + custom templates (very customizable)
- **Google Workspace** + Sheets (minimal but functional)
- **Notion** (growing HR template ecosystem)
- **Monday.com** (workflow-based)

**What matters most to you?** (payroll, remote teams, compliance, etc.) I can narrow recommendations further.
